# Accounts Payable Experience API

**Layer:** Experience | **Pattern:** BFF (Backend for Frontend)
**Generated by:** GitHub Copilot – Claude Sonnet 4.6

## Purpose

Single entry point for the React SPA. Aggregates invoice and payment operations, enforces RBAC (ANALYST / MANAGER / TREASURER) and propagates correlation IDs.

## Key Responsibilities

- Validate OAuth2/OIDC tokens and apply role-based access control
- Aggregate responses from `invoice-management-api` and `payment-management-api`
- Apply input validation before forwarding to business layer
- Propagate `X-Correlation-ID` downstream

## Consumers

| Consumer | Channel |
|----------|---------|
| React SPA | Web (HTTPS) |

## Dependencies

| API | Purpose |
|-----|---------|
| invoice-management-api | Invoice CRUD + workflow |
| payment-management-api | Payment scheduling + status |

## Endpoints Summary

| Method | Path | Roles |
|--------|------|-------|
| GET | /invoices | ALL |
| POST | /invoices | ANALYST |
| GET | /invoices/{id} | ALL |
| PUT | /invoices/{id} | ANALYST |
| POST | /invoices/{id}/approve | MANAGER |
| POST | /invoices/{id}/reject | MANAGER |
| POST | /invoices/{id}/cancel | ANALYST, MANAGER |
| POST | /invoices/{id}/schedule-payment | TREASURER |
| GET | /payments | TREASURER, MANAGER |
| GET | /payments/{id} | TREASURER, MANAGER |

## Security

- **Auth:** OAuth2/OIDC – JWT ****** **RBAC:** enforced per endpoint via middleware
- **Transport:** TLS 1.2+

## NFRs

- SLA: < 300ms | 500 concurrent users
- Observability: OpenTelemetry + Prometheus + Structured JSON logging
- Error format: RFC 7807 Problem Details
